name: Zucchini Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup crushed crackers (or bread crumbs or croutons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Form into tablespoon-sized patties and place on a non-stick skillet.
3. Melt 1 teaspoon margarine in the skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown each patty for about 8 minutes, turning once to ensure even cooking on both sides.
